subcodes.first_line: O graceful branch of the Divine Lote-Tree! Though to outward sight thou art far from view and separated from this gathering [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع لطیف سدره منتهی هر چند بظاهر از بصر و نظر دوری و از این بساط مهجور لکن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
